---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
library(quantmod)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggthemes)


Bund <- read_csv("~/Downloads/ggm26_daily-nearby_historical-data-03-28-2026.csv", show_col_types = F) %>% mutate(date=as.Date(Time)); 
Schatz <- read_csv("~/Downloads/hfm26_daily-nearby_historical-data-03-29-2026.csv", show_col_types = F) %>% mutate(date=as.Date(Time)); 
NG <- read_csv("~/Downloads/ngz26_daily-nearby_historical-data-03-29-2026.csv", show_col_types = F) %>% mutate(date=as.Date(Time)); 
CL <- read_csv("~/Downloads/clk26_daily-nearby_historical-data-03-29-2026.csv", show_col_types = F) %>% mutate(date=as.Date(Time)); 
ES <- read_csv("~/Downloads/esm26_daily-nearby_historical-data-03-29-2026.csv", show_col_types = F) %>% mutate(date=as.Date(Time)); 
```
```{r}
Bund <- Bund %>% arrange(Time) %>% mutate(wday=factor(wday(date)), ret=c(0, diff(log(Latest)))*100) 
Schatz <- Schatz %>% arrange(Time)%>% mutate(wday=factor(wday(date)), ret=c(0, diff(log(Latest)))*100) 
NG <- NG %>% arrange(Time) %>% mutate(wday=factor(wday(date)), ret=c(0, diff(log(Latest)))*100) 
CL <- CL %>% arrange(Time) %>% mutate(wday=factor(wday(date)), ret=c(0, diff(log(Latest)))*100) 
ES <- ES %>% arrange(Time) %>% mutate(wday=factor(wday(date)), ret=c(0, diff(log(Latest)))*100) 
Bund %>% group_by(wday) %>% reframe(Mean = mean(ret, na.rm=T), Stderr = sd(ret, na.rm=T)/sqrt(n()), Std = sd(ret, na.rm=T), Cost = 0.028/125*100, SR=Mean/Std*16)
Schatz %>% group_by(wday) %>% reframe(Mean = mean(ret, na.rm=T), Stderr = sd(ret, na.rm=T)/sqrt(n()), Std = sd(ret, na.rm=T), Cost = 0.013/125*100, SR=Mean/Std*16)
NG %>% group_by(wday) %>% reframe(Mean = mean(ret, na.rm=T), Stderr = sd(ret, na.rm=T)/sqrt(n()), Std = sd(ret, na.rm=T), Cost = 0.013/125*100, SR=Mean/Std*16)
ES %>% group_by(wday) %>% reframe(Mean = mean(ret, na.rm=T), Stderr = sd(ret, na.rm=T)/sqrt(n()), Std = sd(ret, na.rm=T), Cost = 0.6/6000*100, SR=Mean/Std*16)

```

```{r}
Bund %>% group_by(wday) %>% mutate(eq=cumsum(replace_na(ret, 0))) %>% ggplot(aes(date, eq, color=wday, group=wday)) + geom_line() + scale_color_colorblind()
Schatz %>% group_by(wday) %>% mutate(eq=cumsum(replace_na(ret, 0))) %>% ggplot(aes(date, eq, color=wday, group=wday)) + geom_line() + scale_color_colorblind()
NG %>% group_by(wday) %>% mutate(eq=cumsum(replace_na(ret, 0))) %>% ggplot(aes(date, eq, color=wday, group=wday)) + geom_line() + scale_color_colorblind()
CL %>% group_by(wday) %>% mutate(eq=cumsum(replace_na(ret, 0))) %>% ggplot(aes(date, eq, color=wday, group=wday)) + geom_line() + scale_color_colorblind()
ES %>% group_by(wday) %>% mutate(eq=cumsum(replace_na(ret, 0))) %>% ggplot(aes(date, eq, color=wday, group=wday)) + geom_line() + scale_color_colorblind()
```
